ab: Pisaw, smhungi ku madas ppatas da, tduwa saku ksiyukun hug?
ch: W:Pisaw，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎?
en: Pisaw, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: Ungat ka naku uri, nRabay ka nii.
en: I don’t have one either. This is Rabay’s.

ab: Ksyuki ta pnais bi, biqun misu nhari.
ch: W:那可以借我一下子嗎?我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.

ab: Iq, ngali han.
en: Sure, take it.

ab: Mhuway su bi, mhuway su bi ksa ka Rabay uri.
en: Thank you and thank Rabay for me.

ab: Manu ka ksyukun su hug?
en: May I help you?

ab: Miyah ku muway dha patas.
en: I want to return these two books.

ab: Iq, manu ka ksyukun su duri hug?
en: No problem and what else do you need?

ab: Miyah ku kmsiyuk tru patas duri.
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: Kiya da. Tru jiyax do yahi muway da.
ch: M:好了。記得三天後要拿來還。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.

ab: Ini saku biqi ka ssrus na.
en: You haven’t returned me the eraser.

ab: Wada ku muway shiga da.
en: I returned it yesterday.

ab: Ma ungat qtaan ka ssrus mu da.
ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了。
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?

ab: Aji su wada ksiyukun Pisaw da?
en: Did you lend it to Pisaw?

ab: Ini ku kla, saun mu smiling ka hiya.
en: I don’t know. I will go and ask her.

ab: Ksiyukun misu ka ssrus mu han.
en: I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: Rabay, ksiyukan su na Pisaw ka lukus wagi nii hug?
en: Rabay, did Pisaw lend you this coat?

ab: Aji, bnrigan ku na bubu mu.
ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: Ma mdka lukus wagi su ka lukus wagi Pisaw.
en: M:Pisaw’s coat is the same as yours.

ab: Mqarux ka lukus wagi na, ini pndka ka lhang nami.
ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.

ab: Rabay, kmsiyuk su pila Pisaw hug?
en: Rabay, did you borrow money from Pisaw?

ab: Niqan, rubang mu biqun hyaan, smhungi ku madas pila da.
ch: W:有，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

ab: Biqun su knuwan?
en: Then, when will you return the money?

ab: Biqun mu saman da.
en: I will return to him tomorrow.

ab: Iq, Jiyagun su rmngaw Pisaw.
en: Okay, I will tell Pisaw for you.
